purpose: Probe whether a ResourceManager retry anchor yields a healthier control-link action slot than the worker-side socket-reader anchor.

Hadoop.alert_match: 2015-10-17 21:41:44,832 INFO [RMCommunicator Allocator] org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Client: Retrying connect to server: msra-sa-41:8030. Already tried 0 time(s); retry policy is RetryUpToMaximumCountWithFixedSleep(maxRetries=10, sleepTime=1000 MILLISECONDS)
Hadoop.eligibility_note: RM-specific control-link anchor. Tests whether ResourceManager channel recovery becomes distinguishable from the worker-RPC line when the selected alert points at the 8030 retry loop.
